title: Better mobs loot Table
description: add loot table or improve certain loot tables
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8jVgEvSbf78" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>




Goats can drop mutton and leather

Allays can drop xp bottles

Blazes can drop fire charge

Silverfishs can drop 1-3 iron nuggets  

Shulkers drop 1-2 shulker shells

Sheeps can drop leather

Piglins brute drop gold ingot

Creepers, zombies and skeletons have a small chance of dropping their heads

Camels cand drop leather

Villagers and Zombie villagers can drop emerald

Zoglins can drop leather

Vexs can drop their swords
